name: 5'x7' Woven Flatweave Area Rug Blue - Threshold™
description:
Spruce up your space with functional elegance with this Woven Flatweave Area Rug from Threshold™. This woven area rug showcases a flatweave artisanal pattern on a blue backdrop to add depth and dimension to any room in your house. It's crafted from cotton-rayon blend material to offer soft comfort underfoot, and the low-pile construction makes it a perfect pick for a variety of rooms.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
